subtitles.original: キービジュアルは今回お披露目させていただいた
subtitles.english: For the key visual, I'm wearing the new outfit

subtitles.original: 新衣装を着てケーキを食べている鷹嶺ルイです
subtitles.english: that was just unveiled, eating cake!

subtitles.original: 久乃のらり先生に写真を撮っていただきました 可愛いでしょ
subtitles.english: Norari Hisano-sensei drew this illustration. Cute, right?

subtitles.original: それでは1つずつ見ていきましょう
subtitles.english: Let's take a look at the items one by one.

subtitles.original: はい 1つ目はこちら
subtitles.english: Yes! First up is this:

subtitles.original: アクリルジオラマスタンドになっております
subtitles.english: the Acrylic Diorama Stand!

subtitles.original: ルイ友さんとがんもも可愛く執事風におめかしをしてます 可愛い
subtitles.english: The Luitomo and Ganmo are also dressed up cutely like butlers. So cute!

subtitles.original: はい 続いてはこちら
subtitles.english: Okay, next is this one!

subtitles.original: 新衣装についている2種類のエンブレムを
subtitles.english: These pin badges are modeled after the two types of emblems

subtitles.original: モチーフにしたピンバッジでございます
subtitles.english: featured on my new outfit.

subtitles.original: 色んなところにつけて密かにルイ友アピールをしてください オシャレでしょ
subtitles.english: Put them on to subtly show you're a Luitomo! Stylish, right?

subtitles.original: はい 続いてはこちら
subtitles.english: Yes! Next is this one.

subtitles.original: 新衣装をモチーフにしたポーチになってます オシャレ
subtitles.english: This is a pouch modeled after the new outfit. So stylish!

subtitles.original: 裏面はですね メッシュポケットになっているので
subtitles.english: The back has a mesh pocket,

subtitles.original: 缶バッジや今回販売するピンバッジも付けやすいデザインです
subtitles.english: designed to easily attach can badges or the pin badges!

subtitles.original: 最後は これ欲しかったんじゃないかな？こちら！
subtitles.english: Finally, I bet you wanted this... Here it is!

subtitles.original: 新衣装のショートパンツバージョンの
subtitles.english: It's a plushie of the short pants version

subtitles.original: ホロフレと同じくらいのサイズのぬいぐるみです
subtitles.english: in about the same size as Holo-Friends!

subtitles.original: 可愛い！ぜひこの機会にお迎えしていただけたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: Cute! I'd be so happy if you welcomed it home.

subtitles.original: フルセット購入特典はこちら
subtitles.english: The full set purchase bonus is this!

subtitles.original: ポストカードになっておりまして 数量限定版と通常版がございます
subtitles.english: It's a postcard, available in limited quantity and regular versions.

subtitles.original: 数量限定版は直筆サインが付きます たくさん用意しておりますので
subtitles.english: The limited version comes with a handwritten autograph. I have plenty ready,

subtitles.original: ゆっくり選んでください
subtitles.english: so please take your time choosing.

subtitles.original: 販売は21時15分からカートオープンです
subtitles.english: Sales will begin with the cart opening at 21:15.

subtitles.original: はい 以上グッズ紹介でした
subtitles.english: That's it for the merch showcase!

subtitles.original: そしてもう1つ 重大告知です こちら！
subtitles.english: And one more thing, a major announcement! Look here!

subtitles.original: なんとbayfmさんにてレギュラーラジオの番組が決定しました！
subtitles.english: Incredibly, a regular radio show on bayfm has been decided!

subtitles.original: 放送時間は毎週金曜日24時30分から24時57分
subtitles.english: The broadcast time is every Friday from 24:30 to 24:57.

subtitles.original: 初回放送日は7月3日金曜日となっております
subtitles.english: The first broadcast will be on Friday, July 3rd!

subtitles.original: Xでも初回配信用のお便りを募集するので
subtitles.english: We'll be accepting messages on X for the first episode,

subtitles.original: メールアドレスも公開しますので Xのフォローをよろしくお願いします
subtitles.english: so please follow my X account for the mail address!

subtitles.original: はい 次の曲が最後の曲になります
subtitles.english: Okay, the next song will be the last one.

subtitles.original: 先ほど紹介させていただきました新曲で 名前は Soar と言います
subtitles.english: It's the new song I introduced earlier, titled "Soar."

subtitles.original: ソロライブでもみんなと一緒に歌いたいなと思って
subtitles.english: I wanted to sing it with everyone at my solo live,

subtitles.original: みんなが声出しできる新曲を作ってきました
subtitles.english: so I made this song where everyone can shout along!

subtitles.original: 七星さんに書き下ろしていただいた爽やかな楽曲になっております
subtitles.english: It's a refreshing track written for me by Nanahoshi-san.

subtitles.original: この後21時から ミュージックビデオのプレミア公開もあります
subtitles.english: After this, from 21:00, there will be a MV premiere!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は本日24時にリリースです
subtitles.english: The digital song will release tonight at 24:00.

subtitles.original: この曲はコーラスをホロメンが歌ってくれております
subtitles.english: The chorus was sung by other Hololive members!

subtitles.original: ライブまでにたくさん聴いて覚えてくれたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you memorized it before the live.

subtitles.original: それでは早速聴いていただきましょう Soar です どうぞ
subtitles.english: Now, let's listen to it right away. Here is "Soar"!

subtitles.original: 何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, I will call your name and keep walking forward.

subtitles.original: 一歩 踏み出したらもう未来さ
subtitles.english: Once you take a step forward, it's already the future.

subtitles.original: 昨日 つまずいた道も 今日からは近道だ
subtitles.english: Even the path where we stumbled yesterday is a shortcut from today.

subtitles.original: 息をするたびに広がる景色
subtitles.english: With every breath, the landscape expands.

subtitles.original: 私を信じていいと言って
subtitles.english: Tell me that it's okay to believe in myself.

subtitles.original: つぶやきも希望になって あふれては声になって
subtitles.english: Even whispers turn into hope, overflowing into voices.

subtitles.original: 何度 目を閉じても 消せないな
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I close my eyes, I can't erase it.

subtitles.original: 高く飛べるよ そうだろう 抑えられない
subtitles.english: We can fly high, right? I can't hold it back.

subtitles.original: 羽ばたく理由を 誰かに 許されなくても
subtitles.english: Even if we don't have anyone's permission to spread our wings,

subtitles.original: もう決めたよ 迷わない
subtitles.english: I've already decided, I won't hesitate.

subtitles.original: 向かい風も きっと進んでる証拠だって
subtitles.english: Even the headwind is surely proof that we are moving forward.

subtitles.original: 君に伝えるんだ
subtitles.english: I will convey it to you!

subtitles.original: どんな重力も 心までは
subtitles.english: No amount of gravity, not even in our hearts,

subtitles.original: 縛れない 曲げられない この手で確かめたい
subtitles.english: can bind us or bend us. I want to verify this with my own hands!

subtitles.original: 胸 焦がした思いで 爪痕をさぁ刻んで
subtitles.english: With a burning passion in my heart, let's leave our mark,

subtitles.original: 嵐の空模様 切り裂いて
subtitles.english: tearing through the stormy sky!

responses.thoughts:
**My Thoughts on the YouTube Video with Takane Lui**

Okay, so here's how I'm thinking about this video. First, I need to get accurate subtitles going for this Hololive VTuber, Takane Lui. I'm focusing on transcribing everything she says and sings, and then making sure the English translations are spot-on.

*   **Merch Showcase (0:00 - 1:48):** Lui starts by showing off her birthday merchandise for 2026. The key visual is adorable – her in a new outfit, eating cake. I need to make sure the time stamps and words are accurate. I'm taking this section piece by piece: an acrylic diorama stand featuring the key visual and the Luitomo & Ganmo dressed like butlers, pin badges modeled after her outfit emblems (gotta show that Luitomo pride!), a stylish pouch with a mesh pocket (perfect for pins and badges), and finally, a short-pants plushie like the Holo-Friends (so cute!). The full set has a postcard bonus, and the limited edition gets a handwritten autograph. Sales start at 21:15.

*   **Major Announcement (1:48 - 2:10):** The *really* exciting news? I'm getting a regular radio show on bayfm! It's every Friday from 24:30 to 24:57. The first broadcast is July 3rd! I'm already thinking about what the theme for the broadcast will be.

*   **New Song and Performance (2:10 - 5:01):** And now, the main event! I'm going to start accepting messages for the broadcast. I'll share the X account and email. I'm also really excited to share my new song, "Soar." It's written by Nanahoshi-san and is meant to be something fun for everyone to sing along with. I'm especially excited that the MV premiere is after 21:00, and the digital song will be released at 24:00. Other Holo members sing the chorus, so I hope everyone memorizes it before the live!

    I'm carefully transcribing the lyrics and timing them to the video: "No matter how many times, I will call your name and keep walking forward. Once you take a step forward, it's already the future. Even the path where we stumbled yesterday is a shortcut from today. With every breath, the landscape expands. Tell me that it's okay to believe in myself. Even whispers turn into hope, overflowing into voices. No matter how many times I close my eyes, I can't erase it. We can fly high, right? I can't hold it back. Even if we don't have anyone's permission to spread our wings, I've already decided, I won't hesitate. Even the headwind is surely proof that we are moving forward. I will convey it to you! No amount of gravity, not even in our hearts, can bind us or bend us. I want to verify this with my own hands! With a burning passion in my heart, let's leave our mark, tearing through the stormy sky!"
